stories.title: D20 Lands $42.7M Federal Grant — New Douglass Valley K8 Coming to Air Force Academy (TIER 1)

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
D20 is getting a new school.

The DoD awarded D20 a $42.7M grant for a new Douglass Valley K-8 at the Air Force Academy. 787 students. 92,000 sq ft. Natural light, outdoor connections.

Big win for COS families. 🏫 #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
The new Douglass Valley K-8 at the Air Force Academy is a $54.1M project — $42.7M from the DoD, the rest from D20.

787 students PK-8. Modern design. Expected to serve families on base and in the community.

#COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: D20 Wins $42.7M Federal Grant for New Douglass Valley K-8 School at Air Force Academy

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:

**S1-IMG-A** | Social 1200x675 | Gemini base_only
- Prompt: Modern elementary school building exterior bathed in bright Colorado morning light, surrounded by snow-capped mountains in the background. Clean architecture with large windows, green landscaping, a welcoming entrance, warm natural colors. Clear blue Rocky Mountain sky. School feels bright, modern, and hopeful. Clean visual space in the bottom third for text overlay.
- Mood: Hopeful, civic pride, bright future
- Style: Photorealistic, architectural photography aesthetic

**S1-IMG-B** | Article Hero 1200x675 | Gemini base_only
- Prompt: Two elementary-school-aged children (diverse, one girl, one boy) sitting at desks in a sunlit classroom with large windows overlooking mountains. Kids are engaged in a project, smiling. Warm natural light fills the room. Clean modern classroom design with natural wood accents. Bottom third has open desk surface space for text overlay.
- Mood: Academic, community, bright future
- Style: Lifestyle photography, warm and inviting

stories.title: CPSC Recall — EEMB USA Battery Packs (312,100 Units, Amazon) (TIER 1)

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
⚠️ RECALL: 312,100 EEMB coin battery packs sold on Amazon lack child-resistant packaging.

Coin batteries swallowed by kids cause severe burns within 2 hours.

Stop using. Refund at eemb.com/recall. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Check your junk drawer.

Bought EEMB coin batteries on Amazon? Recalled — 312,100 packs. Not child-resistant.

Full refund: info@a2batt.com #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: CPSC Recall: EEMB USA Coin Battery Packs — 312,100 Units Sold on Amazon Not Child-Safe

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
EEMB Battery Recall

**S2-IMG-A** | Social 1200x675 | Gemini base_only
- Prompt: Close-up of a variety of small silver coin/button batteries scattered on a white surface, clearly visible with no child-resistant packaging. One small child's hand (age 2-3) reaching toward the batteries from the left edge — parent's hand stopping the child gently. Urgent, safety-focused composition. Clean white background with plenty of space in the bottom third for text overlay. No logos or branding.
- Mood: Safety alert, urgent but not panic
- Style: Clean, editorial product safety photography

**S2-IMG-B** | Social 1200x675 | Gemini base_only
- Prompt: A home junk drawer open showing various household batteries, remotes, and small items. A parent's hand reaching in, picking up a small coin battery package. Soft home interior lighting. Warm, lived-in kitchen setting. Bottom third is the drawer surface — clear space for text. No branding visible on products.
- Mood: Relatable home safety awareness
- Style: Lifestyle photography, warm household setting

stories.title: Schools on the Move in El Paso County — Co-Location News for 2026-27 (TIER 2)

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
COS school shuffle for 2026-27:

📍 James Irwin Elem → D49 campus (remodel year)
📍 East Hills Academy → Horace Mann MS (co-location)
📍 Orton Academy → Trailblazer Elem

Contact your school for details. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

stories.title: PPLD Summer Adventure 2026 — "Unearth a Story" Starting Soon (TIER 2)

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
PPLD's 2026 Summer Adventure is free — theme: "Unearth a Story" 🦕

30 days of Read, Explore, or Create. Register at ppld.org or the Beanstack app.

D11's last day is May 22. Sign up now. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

stories.title: AAP 2026 — New Guidance on Children's Mental and Emotional Health (TIER 2)

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
The AAP's 2026 framework is clear: build kids' mental health before the crisis.

Five foundations: parent-child bond, routines, physical activity, sleep, community.

COS parents — which feels strongest for your family? #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: AAP's 2026 Blueprint for Kids' Mental Health: Build the Foundation Before the Crisis

- Prompt: A parent (gender-neutral adult) and a school-age child (age 8-10) sitting side by side on a front porch step, looking out at a neighborhood street together. Both are relaxed and comfortable. Early evening warm light. Diverse representation. Child leans slightly toward the adult. No phones or devices visible. Clean visual space on the porch surface in the bottom third for text overlay.
- Mood: Connection, warmth, present-moment parenting
- Style: Lifestyle photography, authentic and unposed

**S5-IMG-B** | Social 1200x675 | Gemini base_only
- Prompt: A family of four (parents and two children, diverse) walking together on a Colorado mountain trail surrounded by pine trees and wildflowers. Everyone is smiling and energized. Morning light. The children are running slightly ahead of the parents, full of energy. Clean open sky in the background upper third, open path in the bottom third for text overlay.
- Mood: Joyful family, active, Colorado outdoor lifestyle
- Style: Active lifestyle photography
